---
title: "Results"
---

This chapter presents the empirical findings.

## Descriptive analysis

Figure @fig-distribution shows the distribution of the outcome variable.

```{r}
#| label: fig-distribution
#| fig-cap: "Distribution of the outcome variable across the sample."
#| fig-width: 6
#| fig-height: 4
#| echo: false
set.seed(42)
y <- rnorm(240, mean = 5, sd = 1.5)
hist(y, breaks = 20, col = "#5b1a8c", border = "white",
     main = "", xlab = "Outcome variable", ylab = "Frequency")
```

## Main regression

Table @tbl-results reports the estimated coefficients.

| Coefficient   | Estimate | Std. error | t-value |  p-value |
|:--------------|---------:|-----------:|--------:|---------:|
| Intercept     |     4.92 |       0.15 |    32.8 | < 0.001  |
| $x_1$         |     0.34 |       0.10 |     3.4 |   0.001  |
| $x_2$         |    -0.18 |       0.10 |    -1.8 |   0.073  |

: Estimated regression coefficients. {#tbl-results}

The slope on $x_1$ is positive and significant at the 1% level. The slope on $x_2$ is negative and borderline significant.
